/usr/bin/c++  -rdynamic -O0 -ggdb -std=c++11 -Wall -Wno-deprecated -Werror -Wno-unused-function -Wno-builtin-macro-redefined -Wno-deprecated-declarations CMakeFiles/orm.dir/src/orm/table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/orm.dir/src/orm/column.cpp.o CMakeFiles/orm.dir/src/orm/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/orm.dir/src/orm/orm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/orm.dir/src/orm/orm_util.cpp.o -o ../bin/orm  -Wl,-rpath,/home/d/blog/sylar/cmake:/usr/local/lib libsylar.so -lpthread -lyaml-cpp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -ljsoncpp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so -lmysqlclient -lzstd -lssl -lcrypto -lresolv -lm -ltinyxml2 -levent /usr/local/lib/libhiredis_vip.so
